title: Luffy and Zoro Clash
description: On pages 9–12, luffy and zoro clash as zoro cuts through the Baroque Works agents at Whiskey Peak while Luffy wakes up and misunderstands the situation.
scene: Luffy and Zoro Clash. Zoro cuts through the Baroque Works agents at Whiskey Peak while Luffy wakes up and misunderstands the situation. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This one cut through a stone axe!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This Sandai Kitetsu has some sharp edge...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: A masterwork blade only cuts when its user wishes to cut something...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This one's gonna be a problem child, alright...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: May the Lord have mercy on us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you're gonna pull a trick like that, do it on a more gullible chap with a pure heart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I hit them with the back of my blade. That's as much mercy you'll get from me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ha ha Ha Ha Ha Ha! Ha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: There's no place for you to run away to up there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Agh! The ladders are all falling down!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on luffy and zoro clash. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
